cascade_issues.title: Power margin reduction
cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel reduces power generation capacity, potentially exceeding peak power consumption limits during imaging mode.

cascade_issues.title: Mass reduction
cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel reduces total payload mass, potentially affecting overall structural dynamics and compliance with mechanical requirements.

cascade_issues.title: Thermal balance impact
cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel may alter thermal distribution and affect temperature stability across orbital cycles, potentially impacting thermal requirements.

missing_tests.activity: Thermal balance test to validate TMM with modified solar panel configuration
missing_tests.reason: Removing the right solar panel affects thermal distribution and requires revalidation of thermal models.

missing_tests.activity: Shock test per launcher SRS ICD with modified payload configuration
missing_tests.reason: Removing the right solar panel changes structural dynamics and requires revalidation of shock response.
